titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 192: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 192. (A.R. No. 47 of 1925.) TIRUKKŌḶAMBIYŪR, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Gokhurēśvara temple.
This inscription records a land transaction which was effected before the āvaṇam of muṉpagal and naṇpagal (forenoon and afternoon) at Pērāvūr, a dēvadānabrahmadēya in Pērāvūr-nāḍu.

A gift of seven mā and odd of land at Kumāra-maṅgalam, a hamlet of Pērāvūr was made by Ārūraṉ Poṉṉambalattaḍigaḷ, the queen of Uttamachōḻa after purchase of the same for 35 īḻakkāśu-karuṅkāśu and poṉ 6 mā and one kāṇi from a lady Kāḍaṉ Siṅgam, who had obtained the land as strīdhana and who now effected the sale through her son Gautamaṉ Kēśavaṉ Śrī Kaṇṭaṉ acting as her guardian. The latter is described as a mahāmāttar of Śāttaṉūr, a dēvadāna-brahmadēyam in Tiraimūrnāḍu, on the southern bank of the river (Kāvēri). The land was sold along with all the pertaining irrigation rights. The land thus purchased was donated by the queen as tiruchchennaḍaippuṟam to the goddess, Madhurāntakan Umā-bhaṭṭāraki, the consort of the god Tirukkōḻambam-uḍaiya bhaṭṭārar, whom the queen affectionately called her daughter.

It is also mentioned the land thus sold by Kāḍaṉ Siṅgam, the wife of Gautamaṉ Śrīkaṇṭaṉ Kēśavaṉ, whose son Gautamaṉ Kēśavaṉ Śrīkaṇṭaṉ acting as a guardian (to the seller, his mother) was made tax-free permanenly in consideration of a lump-sum payment of fifty īḻakkaruṅkāśu paid by the queen, Ārūraṉ Poṉṉambalattaḍigaḷār (to the sabhā). If there was any default on the part of the sabhaiyār, the panmāhēśvaras was to levy a fine of one hundred kaḻañju of gold on the members of the sabhā towards the taxes.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 404.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—... svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu perāvūr nāṭṭu tevatāṉap piramateyam perāvūr muṉpakal naṉpakalāvaṇattuk keṭṭu nikaḻnta nilavilaiyāvaṇam teṉkarait tiraimurnāṭṭu brahmatejam cāttaṉūr mahāmātraṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrī kaṇṭha
ṉeṉ Eṅkaḷammai kāṭaṉ ciṅkattuk mutukaṇṇāy Ivaḷ stridhanam peṟṟa nilamip perāvūrppāl kumāramaṅkalattu Ettaccey paḻampaṭi (1/2)2mā Innilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiyap paḻampaṭi nilam (1/4)2ki(1/4) Innilameḻumāviṉ kiḻkkālum śrī Uttamacoḻar deviyār Āruraṉ poṉṉampalatta
ṭikaḷārkku Ivar makaḷārp perāvūrnāṭṭut tirukkoḻampamuṭaiya bhaṭṭārakar deviyār maturāntakaṉ Umābhaṭṭārakiyārkkut tirucceṉṉaṭaippuṟattukku viṟṟukkuṭukku min nilattukkellai kiḻpāṟ kellai vaḷḷivāykkālu muṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟkun tenpāṟkkellai kāmakkāṇi māṟaṉ pūmi kalattilā
ḷu nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai viṟpāḷ śrīdhanam peṟṟa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai māṭilaṉ koṟṟaṉ mātirutattaṉum tampimārun tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷum nilattukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭa paḻampaṭi nilam (1/4)2māki(1/4) Innila meḻumā
viṉ kiḻkkālum turavu kiṇaṟṟu nilavopāti tirurimaiyum tulaiyurimaiyum nilaiyurimaiyu mettakālil nilaiyurimaiyum niroṭu kālurimaiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttu māttāl Aiñcu vaṇṇattāl vanta Īḻakkācu karuṅkācu 3 10 5 kācu poṉ ṭhanmam Ikkācu muppattaiñcum kācu poṉ Aṟumākkā
ṇiyum Āvaṇakkaḷattey Orutiraṉ Oru kiḻikaic cella Oru nāṟṟey koṇṭu Icceykku melaikkuḷattu niṉṟu Iṟaikkavum pāyavum vaṭavāpparukey vāykkālu micceyk kenteṟu kumāramaṅkalattuk kiḻait teruvil kiḻciṟakaṟṟeṟṟi kaṭainta periya
Illa maṉaiyumuṭpaṭa viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttu mippoṉṉum koṇṭu kuṭuttu Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolaiyāvatākavu mituvallatu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ cilavolai kāṭṭeṉṟāṟ kāṭṭakkaṭavar Allarākavum Ippari coṭṭi Eṅkaḷammai kāṭaṉ ciṅkattu
kku mutukaṇṇāy viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ Ivaḷ makaṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉeṉ . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu perāvūr nāṭṭut tevatāṉa brahmadeyam perāvūr sabhaiyom śrīuttamacoḻar deviyār Āruraṉ poṉṉampalat taṭikaḷār Innāṭṭu śrītirukkoḻampa devar deviyār ma
turāntakaṉ Umābhaṭṭārakiyārkkut tirucceṉṉaṭaikku mahāmāttraṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ tamappaṉ gotamaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉ keśavaṉ brāhmaṇi kāṭaṉ ciṅkam viṟṟukkuṭutta Ivvūrppāl Ikkumāramaṅkalattu Iccuṭṭapaṭṭa Innilattukku śrīuttamacoḻar deviyār Āruraṉ poṉṉampalattaṭikaḷā
ttukku Ipperāvūr sabhaiyom Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu koṇṭa Īḻakkaru
ṅkācu 5 10 Ikkācu Aiympatuṅ koṇṭu candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta Innilam sabhai
yo mitaṉṟeṉil Iṟaiyili nūṟṟukkaḻaiñcu poṉ muntuṟṟa panmāheśvarararey maṉṟap peṟuvatā
ṇippūṣar Itaṉṟeṉṟāraiyu mippaṇi keṭṭa karaṇattāṉaiyum perappoṉ yiṟaiyili mu
ṟpaṭṭa panmāheśvarare Irupattaiṅkaḻaiñcu poṉ maṉṟappeṟuvatāka Oṭṭi Innilac candrādittavaṟ
iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttomipperāvūr sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .§
cempiyarkoṉiṉ naruḷāṟ teṉ kayilāyakkoṉ ṟarumattiṉ panpūrāyitaṉ cūṟṟi Iṉpattikaḻ tirukkoḻampar
kkun teviyaṟkuñ celvanikaḻa nilam veṭṭuviyttā niṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
